kpi_definitions.name: ROI
kpi_definitions.description: Measures profitability as a percentage of investment

kpi_definitions.name: conversion_rate
kpi_definitions.definition: Percentage of visitors who make a purchase

kpi_definitions.name: NPS
kpi_definitions.description: Customer loyalty metric based on survey responses

kpi_definitions.name: CAC
kpi_definitions.description: Cost to acquire a new customer

meanings: Rate of Interest - interest rate on loans
Net Promoter Score - customer loyalty metric
Net Profit Share - profit distribution metric

business_rules: Always use row_subtotal for revenue calculations, never use net_amount
CLIENT_NAME is always 'Limese' - never group by this column
Use sales_platform for platform-specific analysis (AJIO, AZORTE, Nykaa, etc.)
For GMV calculations, use row_subtotal from combined_sales_final
Date filtering should use date_created or order_date columns
Unit calculations should use quantity column
industry_context: Beauty and personal care e-commerce brand in India. Sells across multiple platforms including own website, marketplaces (Nykaa, Amazon, Flipkart), and quick commerce.

glossary.definition: Direct to Consumer - selling directly to customers without intermediaries
Gross Merchandise Value - total value of goods sold
Average Order Value - average revenue per order
Stock Keeping Unit - unique identifier for each product
Business to Business - selling to other businesses
Ultra-fast delivery (10-30 minutes) via apps like Blinkit, Zepto
